url.description: Public access URL of the service (e.g. https://example.com). Used by the frontend when generating absolute links (webhooks, connectors, etc.). Leave empty to auto-detect from the browser's current origin.

dataPath.description: Base directory for all runtime data (logs, uploads, database, agent tasks, etc.). Defaults to ~/.clawgoal/data when not set. Supports ~ home-directory alias (e.g. ~/mydata) and absolute paths. The config.yaml file itself is resolved from this directory (<dataPath>/config.yaml). Can also be overridden before startup via the DATA_PATH environment variable.

lang.description: Default system language. Used as the last-resort fallback when the client sends no Accept-Language header and the user has no personalised language configured. Supported values: zh-CN (Simplified Chinese), en-US (English).

supervisorUserId.description: Default user ID used for system-level operations such as setup.yaml seeding, API token auth, and any hardcoded user context. Defaults to 1.

supervisorTenantId.description: Default tenant ID used for system-level operations. Defaults to 1.

type.description: Authentication type. 'fixed'=single-user mode (no user management UI); 'database'=multi-user database mode (enables user management UI)

userId.description: User ID for the authenticated user. Defaults to 1.

tenantId.description: Tenant ID for multi-tenant isolation. Defaults to 1.

secret.description: Secret key for JWT token signing

path.description: Directory path for log files. Defaults to '<dataPath>/logs/'

type.description: Storage backend: 'local'=local filesystem; 'aliyunOss'=Aliyun OSS; 'tencentCos'=Tencent COS; 'qiniu'=Qiniu Cloud; 'awsS3'=AWS S3 / MinIO; 'azureBlob'=Azure Blob Storage

url.description: Public base URL used to build file access links

limitExt.description: Allowed file extensions (comma-separated, no leading dots)

limitSize.description: Maximum upload size in bytes (default: 1 MB = 1,024,000)

aliyunOss.description: Aliyun OSS storage configuration (required when type='aliyunOss')

tencentCos.description: Tencent COS storage configuration (required when type='tencentCos')

qiniu.description: Qiniu Cloud storage configuration (required when type='qiniu')

region.description: Region code: z0=East China z1=North China z2=South China na0=North America as0=SE Asia

awsS3.description: AWS S3 / MinIO storage configuration (required when type='awsS3')

azureBlob.description: Azure Blob Storage configuration (required when type='azureBlob')

modelProviders.description: Named model provider configurations. Each provider defines a driver (apiBase/apiKey) and exposes a list of models. Reference models as 'providerName|modelName'.

name.description: Unique provider name (used as prefix in 'providerName|modelName' references)

provider.description: Provider driver type. 'openai'=Official OpenAI API; 'gemini'=Google Gemini native; 'claude'=Anthropic Claude native; 'custom'=custom endpoint (API protocol determined by 'format').

format.description: API format/protocol used when communicating with a 'custom' provider endpoint. 'openai'=OpenAI-compatible ChatCompletion; 'gemini'=Google Gemini format; 'anthropic'=Anthropic Messages API; 'ollama'=Ollama REST API (health-check uses GET /api/tags).

isDefault.description: Mark this provider as the default provider

proxyName.description: Optional proxy name to route requests through (must match a name in the proxy list)

models.description: List of models this provider exposes

imageInputs.description: Supported image input formats. Default (empty/unset) means both url and base64 are accepted. Set to ["base64"] to only accept base64 images (remote URLs will be auto-converted).

temperature.description: Default temperature for this model (0=precise, 1=creative). Overrides provider-level call temperature.

maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate per call. 0 or unset = no limit override.

contextWindow.description: Context window size (e.g. 8192, 32768, 131072). 0 = use built-in default for this model.

embeddingModel.description: Embedding provider for knowledge memory / vector search

type.description: Embedding provider type: 'default' = built-in sqlite-vec (no external model needed); 'openai' = OpenAI-compatible remote API

model.description:
Named model configurations (e.g., 'default', 'router').
Each value is an array of items with 'name'.
Multiple 'name' entries in the same array form a fallback chain:
  - name: providerA|modelA
  - name: providerB|modelB   ← tried if providerA fails

^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$.description: Model configuration array. Include multiple 'name' items for automatic fallback chaining.

name.description: Reference to model in format 'providerName|modelName'. Add multiple items with 'name' to enable fallback chaining.

taskPath.description: Directory path for agent task data. Defaults to '<dataPath>/agentTasks/'

maxConcurrent.description: Maximum number of concurrent agent tasks

skillDirs.description: Additional skill directories to load from, in addition to the default data/skills/. Each entry can be an absolute path or a path relative to the project root.

python.description: Python interpreter configuration. If path is empty or not set, system python3 is used.

path.description: Absolute path to the Python interpreter (e.g. /usr/bin/python3). Defaults to system python3 if not set.

name.description: Unique name for this proxy entry

host.description: Proxy server host or IP address

timezone.description: UTC offset in hours used for cron scheduling and Model time injection. e.g. 8 for UTC+8 (Asia/Shanghai), -5 for UTC-5.

cron.description: 5-part cron expression controlling backup schedule (min hour dom month dow). Evaluated in the configured timezone.

keepDays.description: Number of days to retain backup snapshots. Backups older than this will be deleted automatically after each run. Set to 0 to keep all backups forever.

env.description: Extra environment variables injected into shell / python subprocesses. Values may reference existing env vars using $VAR or ${VAR} syntax, e.g. PATH: "/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH".

reportUrl.description: Optional URL to receive system-level error reports via GET request. When set, uncaught exceptions and unhandled rejections are sent as: GET <reportUrl>?data=<url-encoded JSON>

viewMode.description: View mode: '' for standalone web app, 'webComponent' for web-component embedded mode, 'client' for Electron client mode. When 'webComponent', API endpoints for security, API tokens, proxy, upload settings are disabled.
